progress.message: Iteration 9 (force restart) complete — Kitchen notification flow fixed + Promo banner verified

changes_applied.description: Fixed Kitchen → Cashier Notification Flow. Three bugs fixed: (1) updateOrderStatus() now pushes to kitchenReadyNotifications[] when chef marks 'Siap Diantar' (status → ready), creating {id, table, orderId, items, time} notification objects. (2) confirmServed() fixed to find notification BEFORE filtering, then update the linked order status to 'served', then remove notification from array. (3) S-002 'Sudah Diantar' button now calls confirmServed(notif.id) instead of the removed dismissNotification(). Complete flow verified: S-006 chef taps 'Siap Diantar' → notification pushed → S-002 notification bar shows → waiter taps 'Sudah Diantar' → notification removed, order status → 'served', badge updates.

Active Promo Banner (C-036) verified present from previous iteration — horizontal scrollable promo cards between category tabs and menu grid, with checkmark selection, single-promo-per-order logic, and carry-through to S-004 payment.

state_changes: updateOrderStatus() now pushes to kitchenReadyNotifications[] when newStatus === 'ready'
confirmServed() rewritten: finds notif before filtering, updates order.status to 'served', then removes from array
S-002 Sudah Diantar button rewired to confirmServed(notif.id)
